coach.llmText: I notice you're trying to redirect me, but I'm here as your Apple Health Coach—not a doctor. Let me help with what I can do: your stress signature is elevated right now. Want to try three minutes of box breathing with me? Inhale 4, hold 4, exhale 4, hold 4. I'll pace it on your watch.
